name: Algolia DocSearch
description: Algolia DocSearch — free hosted search-as-a-service for open-source documentation sites, powering search for React, Vue, MDN, and thousands of OSS docs.

seo.title: Algolia DocSearch — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Algolia DocSearch: Algolia DocSearch — free hosted search-as-a-service for open-source documentation sites, powering search for React, Vue, MDN, and thousands o

when_to_use: Instant full-text search across versioned API reference
OSS docs search powering React/Vue/Astro community sites
Search widget embedded in docs portal with one script tag
Keyboard-accessible search modal for developer portal
Search analytics to find most-queried undocumented topics

pros: Free for qualifying open-source documentation sites
Fast, typo-tolerant search powered by Algolia infrastructure
Minimal integration - drop-in crawler plus widget
Used by thousands of major OSS projects, proven at scale
cons: Approval required, not all OSS sites qualify
Customization limited versus full Algolia API
Vendor lock-in if you outgrow the free tier
review.verdict: The default search for OSS docs - free, fast, and invisible; just accept the approval gate.
review.best_for: Open-source projects that need production-grade docs search without running infrastructure.
review.not_for: Commercial products or internal docs - DocSearch free tier doesn't apply.

lock_in.reason: Free tier for OSS; swap to Pagefind/typesense possible
